name: CppIndiaCon 2024
description: The fourth annual international C++ celebration brought together 8 global C++ experts for two days of inspiring talks, hands-on sessions, and community networking. Previous iterations featured speakers like Bjarne Stroustrup — father of C++ — and CppCon chair Jon Kalb.

speakers.name: John Stratton
speakers.topic: Software Design and Performance in C++

speakers.name: Jonathan Müller
speakers.topic: An (In-)Complete Guide to C++ Object Lifetimes

speakers.name: Mike Shah
speakers.topic: Getting Started with Modern C++ — A Tour of Features

sessions.title: Software Design and Performance in C++
sessions.speaker: John Stratton
sessions.abstract: How contemporary C++ enables well-organized software and efficient implementations through understanding compiler behaviour and design patterns.

sessions.title: [Keynote] Declarative C++
sessions.speaker: Ankur Satle
sessions.abstract: Expressing intent declaratively so the compiler writes the code — exploring how declarative style improves correctness and maintainability.

sessions.title: Art of Debugging
sessions.speaker: Pavithra Ashok Kumar
sessions.abstract: A systematic approach for identifying bugs, with emphasis on debugging legacy code and preventive strategies.

sessions.title: What is a range?
sessions.speaker: Šimon Tóth
sessions.abstract: C++20 range concepts including views, borrowed ranges, sized ranges, and their performance implications.

sessions.title: Getting Started with Modern C++ — A Tour of Features
sessions.speaker: Mike Shah
sessions.abstract: Modern C++ ecosystem fundamentals: arrays, spans, smart pointers, ranges, concepts, and threading.

sessions.title: Exploring Undefined Behaviour in C++
sessions.speaker: Mahendra Bhagwan Garodi
sessions.abstract: Defined vs undefined behaviour categories, demonstrating common UB scenarios and diagnostic tools to detect them.

sessions.title: An (In-)Complete Guide to C++ Object Lifetimes
sessions.speaker: Jonathan Müller
sessions.abstract: Object lifecycle — construction, destruction, temporary lifetime extension, storage aliasing, and related utilities.

sessions.title: [Keynote] C++ ♥ Python
sessions.speaker: Alex Dathskovsky
sessions.abstract: C++/Python symbiosis using binding tools to accelerate Python workloads, exploring GIL limitations and binding tool comparisons.

gold.name: MulticoreWare
gold.description: AI & multimedia tech company, creators of x265/x266. CTO Dr. John Stratton is a keynote speaker.

gold.name: think-cell
gold.description: Berlin-based C++ software company building PowerPoint automation tools used by 1M+ professionals.

gold.name: Bloomberg LP
gold.description: Building the world's most trusted information network for financial professionals with 9,000+ engineers.

name: CppIndiaCon 2023
description: The 3rd edition of CppIndiaCon was a spectacular success with 577 registrations, 20+ talk proposals, and 22 volunteers. Two days of expert sessions covering AI-assisted programming, coroutines, value-oriented design, concurrency, and more.

speakers.name: Jonathan Müller
speakers.topic: C++ Features You Might Not Know

speakers.name: Kushashwa Ravi Shrimali
speakers.topic: Using C++ for Your Artificial Intelligence Solution

speakers.name: Selvakumar Jawahar
speakers.topic: Why 5G is Fast? and C++ in 5G Open Source

lightningTalks.speaker: Emmanuel Danso Nyarko
lightningTalks.topic: Understanding Dynamic Allocators for Optimization in Containers

sessions.title: Using C++ for Your Artificial Intelligence Solution
sessions.speaker: Kushashwa Ravi Shrimali
sessions.abstract: Practical use of C++ in AI/ML pipelines — from inference frameworks to binding Python AI libraries with high-performance C++ backends.

sessions.title: [Keynote] AI-Assisted Programming (ChatGPT, etc)
sessions.speaker: Bryce Adelstein Lelbach
sessions.abstract: How AI coding assistants like ChatGPT are changing software development workflows — opportunities, pitfalls, and what it means for C++ developers.

sessions.title: C++ Coroutines from Scratch
sessions.speaker: Andreas Fertig
sessions.abstract: A ground-up introduction to C++20 coroutines — demystifying co_await, co_yield, and co_return with practical, runnable examples.

sessions.title: Introduction to Intel oneAPI
sessions.speaker: Kiran Kannappan
sessions.abstract: Intel's unified programming model for heterogeneous computing — targeting CPUs, GPUs, and FPGAs with a single C++ codebase using SYCL.

sessions.title: Lightning Talks
sessions.speaker: Prince Gupta · Emmanuel Danso Nyarko · Mahendra Garodi

sessions.title: Optimization Design Patterns
sessions.speaker: Mike Shah
sessions.abstract: Identifying and applying proven patterns for writing performant C++ — profiling-driven techniques for cache efficiency, branching, and data layout.

sessions.title: C++ Features You Might Not Know
sessions.speaker: Jonathan Müller
sessions.abstract: A tour of lesser-known but powerful C++ language features and standard library facilities that can dramatically improve everyday code.

sessions.title: Understanding Common Concurrency Patterns
sessions.speaker: Venkata Naga Ravikiran Bulusu
sessions.abstract: Practical concurrency patterns in C++ — thread pools, producer-consumer, readers-writer locks, and when to reach for each one.

sessions.title: Value-Oriented Design — by example
sessions.speaker: Ankur Satle
sessions.abstract: Designing software around values rather than entities — improving testability, reasoning, and correctness through immutability and value semantics.

sessions.title: Why 5G is Fast? and C++ in 5G Open Source
sessions.speaker: Selvakumar Jawahar
sessions.abstract: The role of C++ in 5G open-source stacks — architecture, latency requirements, and real-world deployment experiences.

name: CppIndiaCon 2022
description: The 2nd edition of CppIndiaCon featured a lineup of distinguished C++ experts and practitioners from around the world, covering debugging, concurrency, language design, and library development.

name: CppIndiaCon 2021
tagline: The Inaugural C++ Conference of India
description: The first-ever CppIndiaCon kicked off in grand style, featuring C++ creator Bjarne Stroustrup, CppCon conference chair Jon Kalb, and other distinguished speakers from the global C++ community.
